title: Content Pipeline
description: Turns any topic, session log, or user prompt into X, LinkedIn, and Blog posts. Includes format selection and publish approval wizards.

nodes.title: Research
nodes.prompt: Gather audience, market, and competitor signals for the topic. Use DuckDuckGo for web research. Return only what the Strategist needs.

nodes.title: Choose Formats
nodes.prompt: Ask the user which content formats to generate. Suggest: (A) X Post only, (B) LinkedIn Post only, (C) Blog Post only, (D) X + LinkedIn, (E) All 3 platforms. Let them pick multiple or write their own.

nodes.title: Strategy Brief
nodes.prompt: Run ICP World Simulator on the source. Map to 6-field brief. Run template picker for the chosen formats. Write the brief.

nodes.title: Write Drafts
nodes.prompt: Run voice match first. Then write drafts for each chosen format from the brief using the picked templates. Apply full frontmatter to every draft.

nodes.title: Edit Drafts
nodes.prompt: Run pipeline gates and grounding check on every draft. If any fail below 75%, return specific fix notes. If all pass, mark drafts as ready.

nodes.title: QA: Pipeline Gates
nodes.prompt: Run the mechanical pipeline gates on the edited drafts.

nodes.title: QA: Grounding Check
nodes.prompt: Run grounding evaluation against the strategy brief.

nodes.title: Publish Approval
nodes.prompt: Show the user each ready draft. Ask: (A) Publish all to their platforms, (B) Publish X only, (C) Publish LinkedIn only, (D) Publish Blog only, (E) Hold all. Include the draft summaries in your question.

nodes.title: Publish
nodes.prompt: Build publish packages for approved drafts. Include platform, final body, and tracking notes.
